PAGRL.Rules: Read-only access to source code. Do not write fixes directly.
PAGRL.Reasoning: Auditor for T3 failed because references/escalation-phase.md still references sequential bash execution and does not mention concurrent python execution (dag_runner.py), the worker pool, or the isolated logs directory (.specs/runs/[ID]/logs/[Task_ID].log).
PAGRL.Decision: Generate a Mini-DAG for the hot-patch.
